Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Interface ILinkedItem

  • public interface ILinkedItem
    Represents a linked item definition. Linked items are custom item templates that can be globally updated; all existing instances inherit the new properties.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      IItemStack createStack()
      Creates an ItemStack from this linked item definition.
      int getArmorType()  
      int getAttackSpeed()  
      int getDigSpeed()  
      double getDurabilityValue()  
      int getEnchantability()  
      int getId()  
      int getItemUseAction()  
      int getMaxItemUseDuration()  
      String getName()  
      int getStackSize()  
      int getVersion()  
      boolean isNormalItem()  
      boolean isTool()  
      ILinkedItem save()
      Persists this linked item and returns the saved instance.
      void setArmorType​(int armorType)  
      void setAttackSpeed​(int time)  
      void setDigSpeed​(int digSpeed)  
      void setDurabilityValue​(double durabilityValue)  
      void setEnchantability​(int enchantability)  
      void setId​(int id)  
      void setItemUseAction​(int itemUseAction)  
      void setMaxItemUseDuration​(int maxItemUseDuration)  
      void setName​(String name)  
      void setNormalItem​(boolean normalItem)  
      void setStackSize​(int stackSize)  
      void setTool​(boolean tool)  
      void setVersion​(int version)  

    • Method Detail

      • save

        ILinkedItem save()
        Persists this linked item and returns the saved instance.
        Returns:
        the saved linked item.

      • createStack

        IItemStack createStack()
        Creates an ItemStack from this linked item definition.
        Returns:
        the created item stack.

      • getId

        int getId()
        Returns:
        the unique ID of this linked item.

      • setId

        void setId​(int id)
        Parameters:
        id - the unique ID.

      • getVersion

        int getVersion()
        Returns:
        the version number of this linked item.

      • setVersion

        void setVersion​(int version)
        Parameters:
        version - the new version number.

      • getName

        String getName()
        Returns:
        the display name.

      • setName

        void setName​(String name)
        Parameters:
        name - the display name.

      • getDurabilityValue

        double getDurabilityValue()
        Returns:
        the durability value (max damage).

      • setDurabilityValue

        void setDurabilityValue​(double durabilityValue)
        Parameters:
        durabilityValue - the durability value.

      • getStackSize

        int getStackSize()
        Returns:
        the maximum stack size.

      • setStackSize

        void setStackSize​(int stackSize)
        Parameters:
        stackSize - the maximum stack size.

      • getMaxItemUseDuration

        int getMaxItemUseDuration()
        Returns:
        the maximum item use duration in ticks.

      • setMaxItemUseDuration

        void setMaxItemUseDuration​(int maxItemUseDuration)
        Parameters:
        maxItemUseDuration - the use duration in ticks.

      • getItemUseAction

        int getItemUseAction()
        Returns:
        the item use action type.
        See Also:
        EnumAction

      • setItemUseAction

        void setItemUseAction​(int itemUseAction)
        Parameters:
        itemUseAction - the item use action type ordinal.

      • isNormalItem

        boolean isNormalItem()
        Returns:
        true if this is a normal (non-tool, non-armor) item.

      • setNormalItem

        void setNormalItem​(boolean normalItem)
        Parameters:
        normalItem - true for a normal item.

      • isTool

        boolean isTool()
        Returns:
        true if this item functions as a tool.

      • setTool

        void setTool​(boolean tool)
        Parameters:
        tool - true to mark as a tool.

      • getDigSpeed

        int getDigSpeed()
        Returns:
        the dig speed for tool items.

      • setDigSpeed

        void setDigSpeed​(int digSpeed)
        Parameters:
        digSpeed - the dig speed.

      • getArmorType

        int getArmorType()
        Returns:
        the armor type slot. 0: helmet, 1: chestplate, 2: leggings, 3: boots, -1: not armor.

      • setArmorType

        void setArmorType​(int armorType)
        Parameters:
        armorType - the armor type slot.

      • getEnchantability

        int getEnchantability()
        Returns:
        the enchantability value.

      • setEnchantability

        void setEnchantability​(int enchantability)
        Parameters:
        enchantability - the enchantability value.

      • getAttackSpeed

        int getAttackSpeed()
        Returns:
        the attack speed in ticks between attacks.

      • setAttackSpeed

        void setAttackSpeed​(int time)
        Parameters:
        time - attack speed in ticks.
